name: GCS Bucket Operations and Lifecycle
description: Create Cloud Storage buckets, upload and download objects, configure lifecycle rules, and manage access controls.

steps.title: Create a bucket
steps.command: gcloud storage buckets create gs://my-unique-bucket-name --location us-central1 --default-storage-class standard
steps.description: Creates a regional bucket with standard storage class.
steps.tip: Bucket names are globally unique. Use your project ID as a prefix to avoid conflicts.

steps.title: Upload files
steps.description: Uploads all CSV files from the local data directory to the imports/ prefix in the bucket.

steps.title: List objects
steps.description: Lists objects with size, storage class, and creation time.

steps.title: Download objects
steps.description: Downloads a specific object to a local directory.

steps.title: Set a lifecycle rule
steps.description: Applies lifecycle rules such as automatically deleting objects older than 90 days or transitioning to Nearline storage.
steps.tip: Create a lifecycle.json with rules like: {"rule": [{"action": {"type": "Delete"}, "condition": {"age": 90}}]}

fullScript:
# GCS bucket operations and lifecycle
gcloud storage buckets create gs://my-unique-bucket-name --location us-central1 --default-storage-class standard
gcloud storage cp ./data/*.csv gs://my-unique-bucket-name/imports/
gcloud storage ls gs://my-unique-bucket-name/imports/ --long
gcloud storage cp gs://my-unique-bucket-name/imports/report.csv ./downloads/
# Create lifecycle.json then apply
gcloud storage buckets update gs://my-unique-bucket-name --lifecycle-file=lifecycle.json

faq.question: What storage classes are available?
faq.answer: Standard (frequent access), Nearline (once a month), Coldline (once a quarter), and Archive (once a year). Each has lower storage costs but higher retrieval costs.

faq.question: How do I make a bucket publicly readable?
faq.answer: Use 'gcloud storage buckets add-iam-policy-binding gs://my-bucket --member=allUsers --role=roles/storage.objectViewer'. This grants public read access to all objects.
